import pytest
from source import find_first_in_sorted

def test_find_first_in_sorted_duplicates_infinite_loop():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 5, 5, 5, 6]
    target = 5
    result = find_first_in_sorted(arr, target)
    expected = 2
    assert result == expected, f"Expected first occurrence of {target} at index {expected}, got {result}"
